title: Jellyflow Viewport Interaction Kernel v1
problem: Jellyflow needs deterministic headless viewport pan/zoom interaction helpers, gesture callbacks, and conformance traces so adapters can prove XyFlow-like viewport feel before renderer smoke tests.

evidence.summary: Opened the viewport interaction kernel workstream from conformance fixture, node drag, and geometry follow-ons, with ADR 0003 renderer-free constraints.
Added renderer-neutral viewport transform helpers for drag-pan and zoom-around-pointer, with focused tests and public surface coverage.
Wired viewport pan/zoom intent through NodeGraphStore view-state publication and added viewport move gesture callbacks.
Added viewport pan/zoom conformance actions and fixture traces, and converted viewport adapter ordering to the fixture runner.
Documented viewport conformance before renderer smoke tests, recorded closeout evidence, and closed the workstream with follow-ons split.

continue_policy.notes: Viewport interaction kernel v1 is closed. Follow-ons: viewport animation/smoothing, auto-pan integration, adapter runner helpers, and renderer smoke tests outside jellyflow-runtime.
